taxonomy: Ceratostylis pleurothallis is classified under the family Orchidaceae and is a genus of terrestrial orchids, specifically a species within the subfamily Orchidoideae. Further classification places it within the tribe Gastrodieae and subtribe Gastrodiinae. At the genus level, it is grouped with other terrestrial orchids that grow in the tropical regions of Asia. The species is native to the islands of the Pacific and Southeast Asia, where it grows in shaded, humid environments. Its classification reflects its unique characteristics and adaptations to its native habitats.
